title: Haffner Energy and Renewable Energy Project Developer IGNIS P2X Launch Bio/e-SAF Project AeroVerde in Spain
content: Haffner Energy and IGNIS P2X have launched AeroVerde, a collaborative project to produce bio- and e-Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) in Spain. The initiative combines Haffner Energyâ€™s proprietary technology, which converts residual biomass into hydrogen-rich syngas, with IGNIS P2Xâ€™s renewable energy capabilities. The project will produce bio-SAF via pathways such as Alcohol-to-Jet and Fischer-Tropsch, while combining excess biogenic COâ‚‚ with renewable hydrogen to create e-SAF. Currently, the partners are identifying an optimal site in Spain, prioritizing proximity to local biomass supplies and off-takers. This collaboration addresses the urgent need to scale domestic SAF production to meet ReFuelEU Aviation mandates, which require a 6% SAF blend by 2030. Executives from both companies emphasized their shared commitment to the circular economy and reducing reliance on imported feedstocks.
author: Analysts Account
